finding: The from-scratch bi-LSTM reaches accuracy 0.619 on issue_type. With only ~190 training messages it trails the TF-IDF baseline and fine-tuned DistilBERT (both ~1.0) — expected at this data scale, where a small model with strong priors (char n-grams) or transfer learning beats a randomly-initialised recurrent net. Reporting this honestly demonstrates the trade-off; the LSTM would benefit most from a larger/extended dataset.
